impact: This advances the PP&D plan by adding narrow, fixture-only validation for source-grounded sign permit requirement extraction without live crawling or shared contract churn.
summary: Add a focused sign-permit requirement extraction fixture test with seven deterministic categories and explicit stop-gate checks.
target_task: Task checkbox-98: Add a focused validation test for sign permit requirement extraction that checks only the seven fixture categories, source evidence IDs, confidence bounds, deduplication, and explicit stop-gate classifications.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
